neighborhoods.name: El Valle Centro
neighborhoods.description: Mountain town inside a volcanic crater with a famous Sunday market, hot springs, and cool climate
neighborhoods.character: Crater town, Sunday market, hot springs, cool climate

housing.predominantType: Houses and cabins near the town center

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of El Valle de Antón. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living El Valle de Antón

neighborhoods.name: La Mesa / Las Mozas
neighborhoods.description: Hillside areas above the valley with mountain views and slightly cooler temperatures
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to El Valle de Antón's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living El Valle de Antón

neighborhoods.name: Anton (San Juan de Dios)
neighborhoods.description: Lowland town at the base of the mountains with more affordable living and highway access
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living El Valle de Antón

neighborhoods.name: Crater Edge Communities
neighborhoods.description: Scenic areas along the crater rim with established expat community and organized activities
neighborhoods.character: Crater rim, expat community, nature immersion

housing.predominantType: Custom houses, eco-retreats, and mountain properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living El Valle de Antón
